catalog_content:
Item Name: Tiptree English Blossom Honey (Set) 340g
Bullet Point 1: Pure English Honey: Sourced from the heart of the English countryside, offering a taste of local tradition.
Bullet Point 2: Delicate Floral Flavor: Enjoy the subtle sweetness and floral notes of English blossom honey.
Bullet Point 3: Versatile Sweetener: Perfect for toast, yogurt, tea, or simply enjoying on its own.
Bullet Point 4: Natural Goodness: Free from artificial additives and preservatives, offering a pure and wholesome sweetener.
Bullet Point 5: High-Quality Brand: Trust Tiptree's reputation for producing exceptional preserves and honeys.
Product Description: A natural, set honey gathered from the English Countryside. The Wilkin family have been farming at Tiptree, Essex, since 1757, and making quality preserves there since 1885. We grow a wide range of traditional English fruits and use them to make conserves and condiments in our nut-free factory by the farm. Our products are made to cherished recipes and are free from artificial colours and flavours. We inspect and prepare our fruit by hand then cook in small batches using traditional, copper-bottomed pans. We received our first Royal Warrant from George V in 1911, and remain Royal Warrant holders as purveyors of Tiptree Products to Her Majesty, Queen Elizabeth II.
Value: 1.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium honey product with a long-standing heritage brand, positioned as a high-quality, natural sweetener. The glass jar and royal warrant association suggest a premium price point. Handcrafted in small batches with traditional methods and free from artificial additives, justifying a higher cost compared to mass-produced alternatives.
